description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 4, 2026 at 3:53 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Santa Monica, California was in a collision 
involving a pickup truck on 12th Court near Colorado Avenue. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northwestbound on 12th Court when it maneuvered to the right and slowed to a stop in-lane to yield to a 
pickup truck traveling southeastbound on 12th Court. While the Waymo AV was stopped, the pickup truck slowed to a stop in close 
proximity to the Waymo AV, then proceeded forward to pass the Waymo AV on the left, and the left side of the pickup truck made contact 
with the rear left side of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous 
mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
